german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Customer-Facing Roles Close Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A slight gap indicates a competitive landscape for PM roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Workforce
seniority.subtitle: With 61% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: Fragmented Work Modes Indicate Uncertain Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remain unclassified, highlighting mixed expectations for remote and on-site work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Nearly half of roles demand AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Yet Unclassified
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
